---
title: "About Me"
about:
  template: solana
  image: ./images/profile.png
  image-width: 15em
toc: true
toc-title: "Content"
toc-depth: 2
---

::: {style="text-align: justify"}

I am a professional passionate about the intersection between engineering and data science. Currently, I am pursuing a **Master's Degree in Data Science** at the Universidad de Sonora, focusing on Natural Language Processing (NLP) and the development of Large Language Models (LLMs).

My experience combines the analytical foundation of chemical engineering with modern software development and data analysis tools.

:::

::: {style="text-align: justify"}

## Education

:::{.cv-entry}
:::{.cv-header}
[Master's Degree in Data Science]{.cv-title} | Universidad de Sonora
:::
:::{.cv-subtitle}
August 2023 - June 2026
:::
Focus on Python, SQL, NoSQL databases, ETL processes, machine learning models, neural networks, NLP, and time series analysis.
:::

:::{.cv-entry}
:::{.cv-header}
[Bachelor's Degree in Chemical Engineering]{.cv-title} | Universidad de Sonora
:::
:::{.cv-subtitle}
August 2018 - June 2023
:::
Skills in process simulation and optimization (MATLAB, ASPEN HYSYS).
:::

:::

::: {style="text-align: justify"}

## Professional Experience

:::{.cv-entry}
:::{.cv-header}
[Data Scientist]{.cv-title} | CT Internacional
:::
:::{.cv-subtitle}
February 2025 - Present
:::
Engineered and deployed a production-grade multi-agent chatbot with LangGraph and Vertex AI (Gemini), migrating from LangChain/OpenAI, with a multi-tool RAG pipeline over structured and semi-structured data (SQL, XML, PDF) for product search, promotions, and warranty queries. Built an LLM-as-judge monitoring stack and a GitHub Actions + Podman CI/CD pipeline for reproducible deployments. Also built and deployed **Pulse**, a customer analytics platform automating RFM/K-Means segmentation and FP-Growth market basket analysis behind a FastAPI + DuckDB + Plotly dashboard, running self-supervised on an on-premise server.

[Read more about the chatbot →](./2_ct_chatbot/index.html) · [Read more about Pulse →](./5_ct_dashboard/0_home.html)
:::

:::{.cv-entry}
:::{.cv-header}
[Data Scientist]{.cv-title} | DARIG – Consultores (Salsas Castillo)
:::
:::{.cv-subtitle}
March 2025 - Feb 2026
:::
Developed **GlorIA**, an internal AI assistant with OpenAI function-calling and SQL toolkits to automate executive reporting, integrated with Telegram for on-the-go KPI queries. Led the architectural transition from a RAG prototype to a Model Context Protocol (MCP) framework, enabling autonomous SQL execution and improving long-term maintainability.

[Read more →](./3_salsas_chatbot/index.html)
:::

:::{.cv-entry}
:::{.cv-header}
[Data Engineer]{.cv-title} | DARIG – Consultores (Frutal)
:::
:::{.cv-subtitle}
October 2025 - Feb 2026
:::
Resolved critical Stack Smashing memory errors caused by unstable legacy ODBC drivers by designing a containerized (Podman) cross-platform ETL pipeline, migrating 6 production tables from a legacy HFSQL database to Parquet format on Google Cloud Platform for executive dashboards.

[Read more →](./4_frutal/index.html)
:::

:::{.cv-entry}
:::{.cv-header}
[Data Scientist]{.cv-title} | National Energy Control Center (CENACE)
:::
:::{.cv-subtitle}
May 2024 - Feb 2026
:::
Designed a secure, on-premise RAG system (FastAPI, Ollama, FAISS) to optimize the IT help desk's incident resolution across 2,800 historical tickets, achieving a 24.4-second average response time and a 4.4/5 technical precision rating. Built an automated feedback loop to re-ingest high-rated responses and an ML-based ticket classification system to streamline triage.

[Read more →](./1_cenace_helpdesk/index.html)
:::

:::

::: {style="text-align: justify"}

## Technical Skills

**Languages**

<span class="badge bg-primary">Python</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">SQL</span>
<span class="badge bg-info text-dark">NoSQL</span>
<span class="badge bg-dark">JavaScript</span>

**AI & Data Science**

<span class="badge bg-success">LangChain</span>
<span class="badge bg-primary">LangGraph</span>
<span class="badge bg-info text-dark">Vertex AI / Gemini</span>
<span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">Ollama</span>
<span class="badge bg-info text-dark">Hugging Face</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">Scikit-learn</span>
<span class="badge bg-dark">Pandas</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">NumPy</span>
<span class="badge bg-info text-dark">Matplotlib</span>
<span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">Seaborn</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">RAG</span>
<span class="badge bg-primary">MCP</span>

**Databases**

<span class="badge bg-danger">PostgreSQL</span>
<span class="badge bg-danger">MySQL</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">MongoDB</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">FAISS</span>
<span class="badge bg-dark">Redis</span>
<span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">HFSQL</span>
<span class="badge bg-info text-dark">DuckDB</span>

**Development & DevOps**

<span class="badge bg-info text-dark">FastAPI</span>
<span class="badge bg-dark">Docker/Podman</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">Git/GitHub</span>
<span class="badge bg-primary">DagsHub</span>
<span class="badge bg-danger">GCP</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">Plotly</span>

**Certifications**

<span class="badge bg-success">Data Analysis – DataCamp</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">ML Scientist in Python – DataCamp</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">Data Science with Python – DataCamp</span>

:::

::: {style="text-align: justify"}

## Languages

:::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-6}
🇲🇽 **Spanish** — Native

🇺🇸 **English** — Fluent

🇵🇹 **Portuguese** — Fluent
:::

:::{.g-col-6}
🇫🇷 **French** — Fluent

🇯🇵 **Japanese** — Intermediate

🇩🇪 **German** — Intermediate
:::

:::

:::

::: {style="text-align: justify"}

## Interests

I am passionate about continuous learning of languages and cultures — I currently speak 6 languages. I enjoy dancing and traveling, and I am deeply motivated by applying technology to solve real business problems through data and artificial intelligence.

:::
